reasoning: SPY at 685.95 is squeezed into a narrow $2.64-range between primary support at 685.00 and primary resistance at 688.59 (Active tier, 2★). The battle level is 688.59 — overhead resistance that caps today's upside. However, below 685.00 lies a 7.92-point void to Carry 678.03, creating asymmetric downside risk. With VIX rising +25% overnight into elevated territory (26.9, IV_REGIME=HIGH) and ribbon stack MIXED (no directional lean), price action bias is BEARISH: more room to drop than rally. Initial test likely hits 685.00 support (from above, on any intraday pullback); a break below triggers a flush toward 678.03.

primary.condition: if SPY rallies to 688.59 and holds

secondary.entry_trigger: 685.00 break + VIX expansion confirmed + momentum divergence

tertiary.condition: if price consolidates 685-688.59 zone without direction
tertiary.entry_trigger: waiting for ribbon stack alignment or macro catalyst

key_observations: 688.59 Active resistance is today's ceiling — prior session RTH high, 2★ strength, defines bear-case downside target if broken above triggers rallies to 693.66 Carry.
Asymmetric downside: 685.00 support is only $0.95 below; loss of this level opens 7.92-point drop to 678.03 Carry. Risk/reward favors bears until 688.59 breached decisively.

Ribbon MIXED (15¢ spread, pivot 686.27) provides no directional anchor. VIX +25% overnight into HIGH IV regime suggests elevated volatility but no clear momentum vector — expect chop until ribbon stack aligns or Carry levels engage.
Reference-tier round-number supports (685, 684, 683) between current price and 678.03 Carry will act as micro-support on declines; however, Carry 678.03 is the true floor.
Carry 693.66 above battle zone is outside immediate play but becomes relevant only if 688.59 gives way — signaling a trending day. Current data does not suggest that conviction.
